examples: The stench from rotting food is stomach-churning.
He couldn't see the hyena, but the stench of it was there, the stagnant reek of meat and sweat and piss.
The stench of burning rubber was overpowering.
Unsurprisingly, the stench made the section south of the market a rather insalubrious place to live.
In 1858, parliament was famously suspended because the stench coming from the river was so bad.
